_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The August 2024 analog and current ETF inflow dynamics suggest that complacency will resolve upward as institutional bidding absorbs retail fear and transitions the market into tentative optimism.
next_move.brains_agree: Yes, both brains agree the next move is UP toward Hope, though the analyst is more conditional on breakout confirmation while the narrative writer treats it as a higher-conviction inevitability.
next_move.confirmed_if: BTC breaks $67K with sustained ETF inflows and funding remains controlled below 0.015%.
next_move.invalidated_if: BTC loses $60K with funding flipping deeply negative and VIX spiking above 25.
